title: Savory Chinese Tofu Stir-fry
description: A salty, tender, hangover-cure Chinese dish featuring white wine vinegar, whisk, and jain-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular soy sauce is fine, but use jain-friendly if available

ingredients.name: Olive oil or sesame oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and as a flavor enhancer

ingredients.name: Pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of heat

instructions: Prepare the tofu by pressing it to remove excess water.
Slice the tofu into thin strips and season with pepper flakes, salt, and soy sauce. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together white wine vinegar, olive oil, and sesame oil. Set aside as a dressing for serving.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sliced scallions to sauté until fragrant.
Add the marinated tofu strips to the wok and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, turning frequently to prevent burning.
Drizzle the dressing mixture over the stir-fried tofu. Toss well to combine flavors.
Serve hot with garnished green onions.
